name: FAMILY OFFICE OF AMERICA, INC.
summary: PART I Background Description of Business On December 17, 2024, the Companys name was changed from Qualis Innovations, Inc. to Family Office of America, Inc. with the State of Nevada, and that name change (and accompanying stock ticker change from QLIS to FOFA) was processed by FINRA on or about December 23, 2024. Family Office of America, Inc. (the Company or Family Office), formerly known as Qualis Innovations, Inc., Hoopsoft Development Corp., Yellowstone Mining Inc., Sky Digital Stores Corp....
